article.title: Accelerating Zero-Knowledge Proof Generation With Reconfigurable Hardware (KAIST)
article.summary: Researchers from Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST) have published “ZK-Flex: A Flexible and Scalable Framework for Accelerating Zero-Knowledge Proofs”. Abstract “Zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP) allows a prover to convince a verifier of computational correctness without revealing private data, ensuring both privacy and verifiability. However, proof generation is highly compute-intensive, dominated by polynomial (POLY) and elliptic-curve (EC) operations. These workloads pose two key challenges for hardware acceleration: (1) efficiently supporting diverse large-precision modular multiplications, and (2) maintaining high utilization across workloads that dynamically shift between POLY and EC stages. Existing reconfigurable accelerators address these issues only partially, r
article.title_zh: 使用可重構硬體加速零知識證明生成（KAIST）
article.summary_zh: 來自韓國高等科學技術學院（KAIST）的研究人員發表了「ZK-Flex：一個用於加速零知識證明的靈活且可擴展的框架」。

article.title: The latest Gemma 4 models use a training trick to slash their on-device memory footprint
article.summary: TL;DR Gemma 4 models are now available for download with quantization-aware training (QAT), which reduces the size and memory footprint of the models. These open-source models retain quality better thanks to QAT compared to those that use post-training quantization (PTQ). The Gemma 4 models optimized with QAT are available in five sizes: Gemma 4 E2B, Gemma 4 E4B, Gemma 4 12B, Gemma 4 26B A4B, and Gemma 4 31B. Following Google’s launch of the laptop-grade Gemma 4 12B model earlier this week, the company is releasing new Gemma 4 model checkpoints with quantization-aware training. Quantization is necessary to reduce the amount of memory required to run lightweight models. The standard method is post-training quantization (PTQ), which quantizes the model after training, but could result in wea
article.title_zh: 最新 Gemma 4 模型使用訓練技巧大幅減少裝置記憶體佔用
article.summary_zh: Gemma 4 模型現已支援量化感知訓練 (QAT)，減少模型大小和記憶體佔用，同時保持更好的品質。

article.title: AMD reaches almost 45% CPU share in the latest Steam Hardware Survey for Windows gaming PCs — Ryzen is steadily gaining ground against Intel's legacy domination
article.summary: The latest Steam Hardware Survey is out and it's showing positive signs of growth for AMD, while Intel is unfortunately on a decline. The Red Team posted its best-ever CPU market share numbers in May 2026 with 45% of all CPUs on Windows being from AMD, while Intel is down to 55%, which is still more for now.
article.title_zh: AMD 在最新 Steam 硬體調查中的 Windows 遊戲 PC CPU 份額接近 45% — Ryzen 正穩步蠶食 Intel 的傳統優勢
article.summary_zh: 最新 Steam 硬體調查顯示 AMD 增長積極，Intel 則不幸下滑。Team Red 在 2026 年 5 月創下最佳 CPU 市場份額紀錄，Windows 上 45% 的 CPU 來自 AMD，而 Intel 降至 55%。

article.title: Taiwanese startup FormulaV Line wants to break into US market with two new unique cases — company expects products to become available on Newegg later this year
article.summary: Taiwanese startup FormulaV Line wants to break into the U.S. market with these two new and unique cases. It also showed off a plethora of other components, including PSUs, cooling solutions, and even a gaming chair on the showfloor at Computex 2026.
article.title_zh: 台灣新創FormulaV Line推出兩款獨特機殼搶攻美國市場——預計今年稍晚在Newegg上市
article.summary_zh: 台灣新創公司FormulaV Line推出兩款新穎獨特的機殼進軍美國市場，並在Computex 2026展會展出多項其他組件包括電源供應器、散熱方案和遊戲椅。

article.title: G.Skill explains how AMD EXPO ULL unlocks additional performance — expanded profiles allow memory makers to include subtiming tweaks for the first time
article.summary: AMD's EXPO Ultra Low Latency program, announced at Computex 2026, aims to give users a one-click route to lower memory latencies than its existing EXPO profiles
article.title_zh: G.Skill解釋AMD EXPO ULL如何解鎖額外性能——擴展配置檔首次允許記憶體製造商包含子時序微調
article.summary_zh: AMD在Computex 2026發佈的EXPO Ultra Low Latency計畫旨在為用戶提供一鍵降低記憶體延遲的方案。

article.title: ASML becomes Europe's most valuable company ever as analysts bet on higher EUV output — its market cap hit $674 billion this week
article.summary: ASML closed Wednesday, June 3rd, as the most valuable company in European history, reaching a market cap of $668 billion.
article.title_zh: ASML 成為歐洲歷史上最有價值的公司，分析師看好 EUV 產量增長 — 本週市值達到 $674 億
article.summary_zh: ASML 在 6 月 3 日星期三收盤時成為歐洲歷史上最具價值的公司，市值達到 $668 億。

article.title: Google signs $920M monthly compute deal with SpaceX — company’s projected annual data center revenue to exceed its combined proceeds from Starlink, launch services, and AI in 2025
article.summary: Google's $920-million-a-month deal with SpaceX will let it secure 110,000 Nvidia GPUs starting October 2026. This is the second data center deal that SpaceX has secured in a matter of weeks, especially as it's quickly approaching its IPO on June 12, 2026.
article.title_zh: Google 與 SpaceX 簽訂月度 $920M 計算交易 — 公司預計 2025 年年度數據中心收入將超過 Starlink、發射服務和 AI 的合計收益
article.summary_zh: Google 與 SpaceX 簽署的月度 $920 百萬交易將使其從 2026 年 10 月起獲得 110,000 個 Nvidia GPU，這是 SpaceX 數週內獲得的第二份數據中心交易。

article.title: I like Pixel phones, but these 5 features are why I stick with Samsung
article.summary: Credit: Zac Kew-Denniss / Android Authority On paper, Google’s Pixel phones check almost every box. They get Android updates first, take fantastic photos, have great designs, and offer some exclusive features like Add Me and the Pixel Screenshots app. Yet, if you gave me a choice, I’d take a Galaxy phone over a Pixel any day . That’s not a knock on Pixel phones. If anything, it’s a testament to how much Galaxy phones have improved over the years. They offer several features that Google still hasn’t matched, such as more customization options, better first-party apps, powerful automation tools, and seamless integration with Windows PCs.
article.title_zh: 我喜歡 Pixel 手機，但這 5 個功能是我堅持使用 Samsung 的原因
article.summary_zh: 儘管 Google Pixel 手機在紙面上幾乎滿足所有條件，但 Samsung Galaxy 手機仍提供了獨特的功能優勢。

article.title: UK to Buy AI Chips From British Tech Firms, Telegraph Reports
article.summary: The UK will offer to buy artificial intelligence chips from technology companies in an effort to encourage them to stay in Britain, the Telegraph reported on Sunday.
article.title_zh: 英國將從英國科技公司購買 AI 晶片，電訊報報導
article.summary_zh: 根據電訊報週日報導，英國將提出向科技公司購買人工智慧晶片，以鼓勵它們留在英國。

article.title: Mysterious new Philips Hue icons could hint at plans to take on Nanoleaf
article.summary: Credit: Hueblog TL;DR Icons for what appear to be two unannounced products were spotted in the Philips Hue app. One of the icons suggests the company could release hexagon panels. The other icon hints at a larger version of the Hue Go. Sometime later this month, Philips Hue is expected to reveal some new lighting products for your smart home . It’s unknown what the company has up its sleeve, but it may have just accidentally tipped its hand early. Two of its upcoming products may have leaked through the Philips Hue app. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: 神秘新 Philips Hue 圖示可能預示其挑戰 Nanoleaf 的計劃
article.summary_zh: Philips Hue 應用中發現新圖示，暗示公司可能推出六邊形面板和更大版本的 Hue Go。
